preconditions: User navigates to login page URL http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/login?data=undefined
Login page should display username textbox, password textbox, SIGN IN button, back navigation button, and home navigation button

testCases.title: Verify login page loads with correct URL and login form is visible
testCases.expectedResult: Login page loads successfully, the browser URL is http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/login?data=undefined, and the username textbox, password textbox, SIGN IN button, back navigation button, and home navigation button are visible

testCases.title: Verify username textbox accepts input
steps: Enter hacklarr into the username textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Entered text hacklarr is displayed in the username textbox and the field remains editable

testCases.title: Verify password textbox masks entered characters
steps: Enter Icstunnel1 into the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Password characters are masked (for example shown as dots or asterisks) and the actual password text is not visible on the screen

testCases.title: Verify successful login with valid credentials
steps: Enter hacklarr into the username textbox
Enter Icstunnel1 into the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: User authentication succeeds and the application redirects to the home page with URL http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home and the login page is no longer displayed

testCases.title: Verify login fails with invalid username and valid password
steps: Enter invaliduser into the username textbox
Enter Icstunnel1 into the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, an error message indicating invalid or incorrect credentials is displayed, and the browser remains on the login page URL

testCases.title: Verify login fails with valid username and invalid password
steps: Enter hacklarr into the username textbox
Enter wrongpassword into the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, an invalid or incorrect credentials message is displayed, and the login page remains visible without redirecting to the home page

testCases.title: Verify login fails when both username and password are invalid
steps: Enter invaliduser into the username textbox
Enter invalidpassword into the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, an invalid credentials error message is displayed, and the application remains on the login page

testCases.title: Verify login fails when username and password fields are empty
testCases.expectedResult: Login attempt is rejected, the user remains on the login page, and an authentication or validation message indicating invalid or missing credentials is displayed

testCases.title: Verify login fails when username is empty and password is provided
steps: Enter Icstunnel1 into the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Login attempt fails, an error or validation message is displayed, and the application remains on the login page without redirecting

testCases.title: Verify login fails when password is empty and username is provided
steps: Enter hacklarr into the username textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, an error or validation message is displayed, and the user stays on the login page without navigation to the home page

testCases.title: Verify back navigation button redirects user to home page
testCases.expectedResult: Application navigates away from the login page and loads the home page with URL http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home

testCases.title: Verify home navigation button redirects user to home page
testCases.expectedResult: User is redirected to the home page and the browser URL changes to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home

testCases.title: Verify login behavior with leading and trailing spaces in credentials
steps: Enter '  hacklarr  ' into the username textbox
Enter '  Icstunnel1  ' into the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Application processes the entered credentials and either trims whitespace and logs the user in successfully to the home page URL http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home or rejects the login with an invalid credentials message while remaining on the login page

testCases.title: Verify login fails with extremely long username and password values
steps: Enter a username longer than 200 characters into the username textbox
Enter a password longer than 200 characters into the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Login attempt is rejected, the application remains on the login page, and the UI remains stable without page crash, layout break, or unexpected redirect

testCases.title: Verify system handles multiple rapid clicks on SIGN IN button
steps: Enter hacklarr into the username textbox
Enter Icstunnel1 into the password textbox
Rapidly click the SIGN IN button multiple times
testCases.expectedResult: Only a single authentication request is processed and the user is redirected once to the home page without duplicate navigation or visible application errors

testCases.title: Verify login fails when username and password contain only whitespace
steps: Enter only spaces into the username textbox
Enter only spaces into the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Login attempt is rejected, an authentication or validation error message is displayed, and the application remains on the login page

testCases.title: Verify login submission using Enter key with valid credentials
steps: Enter hacklarr into the username textbox
Enter Icstunnel1 into the password textbox
Press the Enter key on the keyboard
testCases.expectedResult: Login form is submitted and the user is successfully authenticated and redirected to the home page with URL http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home

testCases.title: Verify login fails with special characters in username and password
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, an invalid or incorrect credentials message is displayed, and the browser remains on the login page without redirecting to the home page
